title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a single command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list and delete models programmatically.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers with full API coverage.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing LLM, Chat and Embeddings wrappers around Ollama endpoints.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compat).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with reactive and blocking APIs.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for integrating Ollama into Rails or plain Ruby apps.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI wrapper around Ollama written in Rust for terminal chat sessions.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as GitHub Copilot replacements.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting chat, completion and embeddings with async enumerable streams.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack bundling Ollama server, WebUI, and GPU support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store and Streamlit frontend.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that exposes Ollama models as slash commands with role-based access control.
